Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances localization and performance for players in different regions.

Added_Other.name: FFlagGfxSamplerMinMaxLodSupport
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds support for minimum and maximum levels of detail in graphics sampling.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves visual quality and performance of graphics in games.
